audit_items.proof_trace: The only NULL guard in DestroyRandomInfoThreadSet is assert(random_info != NULL) at line 45, which is compiled out in release builds (NDEBUG). AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() returns NULL on AcquireQuantumMemory failure, and all 6 external callers (fx.c:402, statistic.c:774, statistic.c:881, effect.c:3857, threshold.c:2149, fx.c:4562) pass the result directly to DestroyRandomInfoThreadSet without a NULL check. In release builds, the loop at line 46 dereferences random_info[i] with no guard.
audit_items.attack_scenario: An attacker submits a crafted image to trigger AddNoiseImage, EvaluateImage, SpreadImage, or RandomThresholdImage under memory pressure; AcquireQuantumMemory fails causing AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet to return NULL; in non-OpenMP builds the NULL pointer reaches DestroyRandomInfoThreadSet and the unguarded loop dereference causes a crash (DoS).
